title: Handwritten Notebook Notes

imagePrompts.prompt: A realistic photo of an open dotted notebook lying flat, filled with dense handwritten notes in blue ballpoint pen. The handwriting is casual and slightly messy, like study notes, natural imperfections, crossed out words, underlined headings. Shot from slightly above, natural daylight from a window, no flash. Casual desk setting, shot on iPhone.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

A realistic photo of an open dotted notebook lying flat, filled with dense handwritten notes in blue ballpoint pen. The handwriting is casual and slightly messy, like study notes, natural imperfections, crossed out words, underlined headings. Shot from slightly above, natural daylight from a window, no flash. Casual desk setting, shot on iPhone.
promptTranslations.fr:
Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.

A realistic photo of an open dotted notebook lying flat, filled with dense handwritten notes in blue ballpoint pen. The handwriting is casual and slightly messy, like study notes, natural imperfections, crossed out words, underlined headings. Shot from slightly above, natural daylight from a window, no flash. Casual desk setting, shot on iPhone.
promptTranslations.ru:
Используйте английский промпт ниже для генерации изображения; сохраняйте видимый текст, названия брендов, значения переменных и параметры на английском.

Use o prompt em inglês abaixo para gerar a imagem; mantenha textos visíveis, nomes de marca, valores de variáveis e parâmetros em inglês.

promptTranslations.ja:
以下の英語画像生成プロンプトを使用してください。表示テキスト、ブランド名、変数値、パラメータは英語のまま保持します。

A realistic photo of an open dotted notebook lying flat, filled with dense handwritten notes in blue ballpoint pen. The handwriting is casual and slightly messy, like study notes, natural imperfections, crossed out words, underlined headings. Shot from slightly above, natural daylight from a window, no flash. Casual desk setting, shot on iPhone.
promptTranslations.ko:
아래 영어 이미지 생성 프롬프트를 사용하세요. 보이는 텍스트, 브랜드명, 변수 값, 매개변수는 영어로 유지하세요.

imagePrompts.title: Handwritten Notebook Notes

prompt: A realistic photo of an open dotted notebook lying flat, filled with dense handwritten notes in blue ballpoint pen. The handwriting is casual and slightly messy, like study notes, natural imperfections, crossed out words, underlined headings. Shot from slightly above, natural daylight from a window, no flash. Casual desk setting, shot on iPhone.
originalPrompt: A realistic photo of an open dotted notebook lying flat, filled with dense handwritten notes in blue ballpoint pen. The handwriting is casual and slightly messy, like study notes, natural imperfections, crossed out words, underlined headings. Shot from slightly above, natural daylight from a window, no flash. Casual desk setting, shot on iPhone.

promptTranslations.zh: 一张写实的照片，展示了一本平铺的圆点笔记本，上面写满了密集的蓝色圆珠笔手写笔记。字迹随意且略显凌乱，如同学习笔记，带有自然的瑕疵、划掉的文字和下划线标题。从上方微俯拍，自然窗光，无闪光灯。休闲桌面环境，使用 iPhone 拍摄。
promptTranslations.fr: Photo réaliste d'un carnet à points ouvert, posé à plat, rempli de notes manuscrites denses au stylo bille bleu. L'écriture est décontractée et légèrement brouillonne, comme des notes d'étude, avec des imperfections naturelles, des mots raturés et des titres soulignés. Prise de vue légèrement en plongée, lumière naturelle du jour provenant d'une fenêtre, sans flash. Ambiance de bureau décontractée, prise avec un iPhone.
promptTranslations.ru: Реалистичное фото открытого блокнота в точку, лежащего на столе. Страницы заполнены плотными рукописными заметками, сделанными синей шариковой ручкой. Почерк небрежный, как в студенческих конспектах, с естественными несовершенствами, зачеркнутыми словами и подчеркнутыми заголовками. Съемка слегка сверху, естественный дневной свет из окна, без вспышки. Повседневная обстановка рабочего стола, снято на iPhone.
promptTranslations.pt: Uma foto realista de um caderno pontilhado aberto, deitado sobre uma mesa, preenchido com anotações densas escritas à mão com caneta esferográfica azul. A caligrafia é casual e levemente bagunçada, como anotações de estudo, com imperfeições naturais, palavras riscadas e cabeçalhos sublinhados. Foto tirada de um ângulo levemente superior, luz natural do dia vindo de uma janela, sem flash. Ambiente de mesa casual, foto tirada com iPhone.
promptTranslations.ja: 開いたドット方眼ノートのリアルな写真。青いボールペンでびっしりと手書きのメモが書き込まれている。勉強中のノートのように、少し乱雑で自然な書き味。取り消し線や下線が引かれた見出しなど、リアルな不完全さも再現。少し上からのアングルで、窓からの自然光で撮影。フラッシュなし。カジュアルなデスク周りの雰囲気。iPhoneで撮影したような質感。
promptTranslations.ko: 파란색 볼펜으로 빽빽하게 필기한 내용이 담긴 펼쳐진 도트 노트의 사실적인 사진입니다. 공부 노트처럼 자연스러운 불완전함, 취소선, 밑줄 친 제목 등이 포함된 캐주얼하고 약간 어수선한 필체입니다. 약간 위에서 촬영했으며, 플래시 없이 창문으로 들어오는 자연광을 활용했습니다. 아이폰으로 촬영한 듯한 캐주얼한 책상 분위기입니다.
